reviews.comment:
A veces hay que hacer cola para cargar combustible. Pero los chicos que atienden son muy atentos. Y van organizando los autos en los surtidores.

(Translated by Google)
Sometimes you have to wait in line to get fuel. But the guys who work there are very helpful. And they organize the cars at the pumps.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/422157531741884596/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNPNXI3eXFRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Copados los muchachos.  Me dejaron pasar al baño.  Menos mal jaj

(Translated by Google)
The guys were cool. They let me use the bathroom. Thank goodness, haha.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/422157531741884596/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNPcHVxMHdnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Atención cordial del personal de playa, lo único malo hay q hacer mucha cola para q te despachen, faltaría más personal , no dan abasto con la demanda q tiene la estación

(Translated by Google)
The beach staff are friendly, the only downside is the long queues to be served; they need more staff and can't keep up with the demand at the station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/422157531741884596/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNPck03dGV3EAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención. Podés inflar las cubiertas en el surtidor, o aparte ( gratis ). Hay kiosco y para comer comida rápida. Hay que hacer fila por Martin García.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. You can inflate your tires at the pump, or separately (free of charge). There's a kiosk and fast food. You have to wait in line on Martin Garcia.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/422157531741884596/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNPaElHbTdnRRAB
